steps.t: Sarnhad can be found due east of Linhir in Lebennin. Erchar has asked you to travel into Lebennin and provide aid where you are able.
Lanterns can be found throughout Sarnhad in western Lebennin. Erianir has asked you to light the lanterns in Sarnhad.
Children of Sarnhad can be found throughout Sarnhad in western Lebennin. Erianir has asked you to bring hope to the children of Sarnhad before they fa…
Erianir can be found in Sarnhad in western Lebennin. You have lit many lanterns to aid in illuminating the Dawnless Day and comforted those too young …
